title: Workshop & Talk
description: Engage in discussions, learn strategies, and gain insights into tech entrepreneurship through informative sessions and interactive workshops.

title: Projects
description: Collaborate, innovate, and develop real-world solutions while applying entrepreneurial principles in exciting technopreneurial projects.

title: Bootcamp
description: Dive into immersive training sessions, hone skills, and build networks with like-minded individuals in intensive technopreneurship bootcamps.

title: Competition
description: Enter our entrepreneurship competition, pitch your prototype, win prizes. Connect with mentors, investors, and peers to launch your startup.

title: Study Group
description: Join our study group focused on web and mobile app development, where we delve into coding, deploying websites, and exploring frameworks.

title: Community
description: Join our entrepreneurship club for networking, learning, and collaboration. Connect with fellow members, exchange ideas, and create together.
